    L

    Lalafell - Class in races
    Represents the Lalafell race and its specific stat bonuses
    Lalafell() - Constructor for class races.Lalafell
    Constructs a new Lalafell character, initializing their specific base stats, walking speed, and racial traits.
    Lalafell.LalafellClan - Enum Class in races
    Represents the two distinct clans of the Lalafell
    LAWFUL_EVIL - Enum constant in enum class main.Character.Alignment
     
    LAWFUL_GOOD - Enum constant in enum class main.Character.Alignment
     
    LAWFUL_NEUTRAL - Enum constant in enum class main.Character.Alignment
     
    loadFromFile(String, String) - Method in class jobs.Job
    Randomly picks a set of cantrips and 1st level spells, reading from a text file to pick from
    LUX - Enum constant in enum class races.Garlean.GarleanTitles
